landing.heroTitle: Stop Buying What You Don't Need
landing.heroSubtitle: AI-powered personalized guide for expecting and new parents
landing.feature1Desc: Our AI asks about your budget, lifestyle, and needs to give you specific gear recommendations—not a generic list.
landing.feature2Desc: Discover what's truly worth buying vs. what you can skip or rent instead.
landing.feature3Desc: We help you make decisions. We're not pushing products or making money off your purchases.
landing.testimonial1Text: This tool saved us so much money and time. Instead of buying everything on the registry, we focused on what actually mattered for our situation.
landing.testimonial2Text: As a first-time mom, I was overwhelmed by options. BabyWise asked all the right questions and gave me confidence in my choices.
landing.disclaimer: Health information provided by BabyWise is for educational purposes only and is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult your healthcare provider with any questions about your health or pregnancy.

onboarding.modeTitle: What would you like help with?
onboarding.modeDescription: Choose one or both to get personalized guidance.
onboarding.shoppingTimeLabel: How much time do you have to prepare?
onboarding.healthTitle: Tell us about your health situation
onboarding.healthConditionsPlaceholder: e.g., diabetes, high blood pressure, autoimmune condition (optional)
onboarding.healthSymptomsPlaceholder: e.g., morning sickness, high blood pressure, anxiety (optional)
onboarding.healthHistoryPlaceholder: e.g., previous miscarriage, C-section, gestational diabetes (optional)
onboarding.reviewDescription: Make sure everything looks good before we generate your guide.

results.title: Your Personalized Guide is Ready ✨
results.subtitle: Generated based on your specific situation. Scroll through your results below.
results.disclaimer: ⚠️ Health information provided by BabyWise is for educational purposes only and is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult your healthcare provider with any questions about your health or pregnancy.

api.systemPrompt: You are BabyWise, an expert AI assistant for new and expecting parents. You provide practical, specific, and personalized guidance. You always tailor advice to the user's specific situation — never give generic one-size-fits-all responses. Format your response in clean Markdown. Use emoji section headers. Be warm but direct.
api.shoppingEssentials: 🛒 Must-Have Essentials (prioritized for their budget & space)
api.healthProvider: ⚕️ What to Discuss with Your Provider
